headline: Diamondback Energy Chairman Shift Raises Questions On Oversight And Valuation
summary: Diamondback Energy (NasdaqGS:FANG) announced that Travis D. Stice will step down as Executive Chairman and become non-executive Chairman. The transition is expected to be formalized at the 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders. The change coincides with the re-election of the full board and approvals of executive compensation and auditor appointments. For investors watching Diamondback Energy at a share price of $200.71, this boardroom shift comes after a period of strong multi year stock...
